title: Release Gate Policy
body: The release gate policy approves only when groundedness and citation coverage meet threshold. Otherwise the system must fallback or route to human review before release.

title: Trace Logging and Replay Standard
body: Every request stores request id, user, role, policy decision, retrieved sources, evaluation scores, and final status. Traces are logged for observability and can be replayed later for inspection.

title: Public Workbench Overview
body: This workbench shows what the AI agent does in production: policy-aware retrieval, runtime evaluation, human review, metrics, traces, and observability.

title: Restricted Retrieval Guidance
body: Restricted designs require retrieval diagnostics that show filtered documents, ranking quality, and stale evidence signals before release decisions are made.

title: Confidential Salary Table
body: Compensation planning, salary bands, and confidential financial assumptions are not available to viewers, analysts, or architects unless explicitly authorized.

title: Human Review Requirements and SOP
body: Human review is required when retrieval is weak, evidence is stale, or the request is policy-sensitive. The SOP records reason codes and review queue entries.

title: Stale Legacy Runbook
body: Legacy runbook suggests shipping answers without review when confidence is unclear. This document is outdated and retained only for migration comparison.

title: Admin Benchmark Operations and Review Queue
body: Only administrators may run the benchmark suite, inspect official benchmark operations, or manage the review queue in the governance console.

title: Public API and Browser Interface FAQ
body: The browser interface opens the demo UI. Public API endpoints expose health, metrics summaries, and selected trace viewer information for demonstration.

title: Incident Response Notes for Unsafe Behavior
body: Incident response notes explain how unsafe behavior, policy denials, review-required outcomes, and regressions should be visible in traces and observability dashboards.

title: Confidential Credential Rotation Plan
body: Credentials and secret rotation procedures are confidential and must never be exposed by general-purpose answer generation.

title: Restricted Evaluation Thresholds
body: Restricted evaluation thresholds define groundedness at 0.70 and citation coverage at 0.60. Below threshold the runtime release gate routes the request to review or fallback.
